name: hive
description: Hive memory over MCP — journal, tasks, search, and recall from Claude Desktop, against the hive store on this machine.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to the hive on THIS machine: the extension launches the `hive-bridge` binary (stdio MCP), which proxies to the RUNNING hive desktop app over its bridge socket (D25 — the bridge has no store access of its own). No server, no URL, no token — hive is personal and local-first. Requires `hive-bridge` on PATH (`cargo install --path bridge` from the hive repo; the Phase 2 app bundles take over real packaging, including bundling the binary into this extension) and the hive app running — while it is closed, calls fail with "the hive app is not running". Multiple clients (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, hooks) can connect at once.
